title: Thai Chicken Curry
description: A creamy and aromatic Thai-inspired curry made with chicken, silky smooth coconut milk, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, soy sauce, and fish sauce.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
